text.title: Decision Options Memo Template — Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of Decision Options Memo Template must enforce.

rule.rationale: Single-option memos are not memos; they are advocacy.

rule.statement: Each option scores cost / value / risk on a defined rubric.
rule.rationale: Without a rubric, options become apples-to-oranges.

rule.statement: The memo names a single decision-maker.
The memo carries a decision-required-by date.
The memo captures dissent (named dissenters + their objection).
rule.rationale: Suppressed dissent surfaces later as sabotage; named dissent gets resolved.
